pavaro.sutta_1: tatra, bhikkhave, yvāyaṃ jhāyī samādhismiṃ samādhikusalo ca hoti samādhismiṃ samāpattikusalo ca ayaṃ imesaṃ catunnaṃ jhāyīnaṃ aggo ca seṭṭho ca mokkho ca uttamo ca pavaro ca.
pavaro.example_1: Of these, the meditator skilled in immersion and in entering it is the foremost, best, chief, highest, and finest of the four.
pavaro.comment: needs to be comparative or superlative +gen of the four

sātaccakārī.sutta_1: idha, bhikkhave, ekacco jhāyī samādhismiṃ samādhikusalo hoti, na samādhismiṃ sātaccakārī.
sātaccakārī.example_1: One meditator is skilled in immersion but not in practicing persistently for it. …”

valāha.comment: name of a horse in jātaka
